Qdq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
It seems you have come this far due to a special connection.

Qtq6Ag.en:
^4D4DFF You can summon a service NPC for job change.
^4D4DFF Booster promotion eligible players can change jobs through the job change agent.^000000

Q9q6Ag.en: Summon a job change agent for job change.

Rdq6Ag.en:
^4D4DFF Booster promotion eligible players can change jobs through the job change agent.
Third job change can also be done at each job guild.^000000

Rtq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Hey, I know you.
You came back to be an archer again?

R9q6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Err...
You'd better learn all the Basic Skills first before you can become an Archer.

Sdq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Well then. I don't need to say anything else.
I know you'll make a great Archer...

Stq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Although there's no special
reward for you this time, I hope you understand. Take care of yourself.

S9q6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Please get off of that creature you're riding on
then come to find me again...
Okay.

TNq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Haven't you met an archer before?
Keep go on your way.
I'm a special...
Ooops.. this is not what I meant...?

Tdq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Nevermind what I told you.
You heard wrong.

Ttq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Since this is a request from the Eden group, it would be a good idea to participate considering the journey ahead.

T9q6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Please head to  ^4D4DFFCriatura Academy^000000 in Izlude.
Don't forget.

Utq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Good.
I will send you to Izlude.

VNq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Nice to meet you. How may I help you?

Vdq6Ag.en: I want to be an Archer.

Wdq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Well, you're not at the right skill level.
Your job level must be at least ^4D4DFF10^000000
and your Basic Skill level should reach ^4D4DFFlevel 9^000000

Wtq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Because an Archer needs
extremely high concentration,
so we do not accept
those who have little patience.

W9q6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Your Basic Skill is now enough..
....Hm~~ so you are now ready to be an Archer. I will take the step right away.

XNq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Congratulations! You are now an Archer! Also, we hope that you actively participate in many programs for the revival of the Archer Guild.
Ah, items have arrived from the Production Department. Here, take these! These are all yours!

Xdq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Having a bow and arrows, now you became a real Archer.
If you open the arrow container, there are arrows in it and then you can equip them.

Xtq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Originally, only those who have trained hard can use
^4D4DFFArrow Repel^000000 and ^4D4DFFArrow Crafting^000000..

X9q6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
It may seem a bit early, but it'll be okay.
I believe in you.

YNq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Come to think of it, I received a call from ^4D4DFFEden group^000000.
I think they have a  ^4D4DFFrequest^000000 for you.

Ydq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Considering the journey ahead, I think it is a good idea to definitely participate.
Go meet ^4D4DFFSprakki^000000 in Criatura Academy.

Ytq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Haha, you are kidding me..

Y9q6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
I feel sorry but only Novices can change their job.
You already have your own decent job, don't you?

ZNq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
An Archer has skills using a
bow and has various talents.
The greatest ability of an Archer
is attacking enemies
from a long distance.

Zdq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Although an Archer has weaker HP,
he or she can shoot enemies
at a long range,
so an Archer is safer in a real battle.

Ztq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
Although an Archer in Ragnarok has lower HP,
he or she has high accuracy and attack rate
so that the archer can kill monsters
before they get close to an Archer.

Z9q6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
^8E2323An Archer can change
jobs to a Hunter.
Other than Hunter,
if you are a man, you can change your job to Bard
and if you are a woman, you can change your job to Dancer.^000000

aNq6Ag.en:
[Archer Guildsman]
If you have any question, feel free to come and ask me.
